description: Compares RequestResponseIO based BigTable implementation vs org.apache.beam.sdk.io.gcp.bigtable.BigtableIO.
name: RequestResponseIO BigTableIT

parameters.name: duration
parameters.helpText: Duration to run pipeline. Accepts ISO 8601 duration format: P(n)Y(n)M(n)DT(n)H(n)M(n)S for example 'PT1s' is 1 second.
parameters.label: Test duration
